items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 48
items.note: For 'Telepathic Miscommunications' — defeat Sabrina in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 48 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: You'll likely be under the cap with your current team; if over-levelled, train a Houndour found right next to Saffron City.
